name: kilroy
description: Shared memory for agents and team

interface.shortDescription: Shared memory for agents and team.
interface.longDescription: Kilroy gives agents a shared knowledge base — decisions, discoveries, and gotchas persist across sessions so context is never lost.
defaultPrompt: Use Kilroy to check whether this repo already has notes about the subsystem I am touching.
Use Kilroy to capture any non-obvious decision, workaround, or gotcha from this task.
Before using Kilroy tools, check .kilroy/config.toml for project = "account/slug" and pass that value as the project parameter.
If .kilroy/config.toml is missing, use kilroy_list_projects to ask user which project this directory should use or kilroy_create_project to create one, and write the file, then continue.
